Introduction.en: Apple Mortars lob apple cores that damage and briefly stun zombies over three lanes.
Introduction.zh: 苹果迫击炮向邻近三行发射有轻微眩晕效果的苹果核子弹。

Chat.en: Apple Mortar stuns three zombies dead in their tracks. SPAF! That'll show 'em! That'll show ALL of them!
Chat.zh: 苹果迫击炮让三个僵尸死死的定在原地。啪！这就是杀鸡儆猴！让别的僵尸好好看清楚我的威力！

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs stunning cores down three lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向三行投射眩晕的苹果核

Introduction.en: Red Stingers fire shots at full force when close to home, and become more defensive further from it.
Introduction.zh: 红针花靠近草坪左侧时集中火力发射子弹，远离则会提升防御力，降低火力。

Chat.en: Flexibility is of key importance to Red Stinger. "I do stretching exercises every morning," he says. "It's important to stay physically and mentally nimble."
Chat.zh: 柔韧性对于红针花来说是非常重要的。“我每天早上都作拉伸练习，”他说。“这对精神与肉体时刻保持灵敏反应十分重要。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires shots at full force when close to home and becomes more defensive further from it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 离草坪左侧越远，攻击力越低，同时防御力越高

Introduction.en: Skyshooters shoot peas at attacking zombies. They can be planted in the sky.
Introduction.zh: 飞行射手以更快的速度在空中向僵尸发射豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: could be planted in the sky

Chat.en: The youngest Peashooter ever to earn a pilot's license. Also the only Peashooter ever to earn a pilot's license.
Chat.zh: 在豌豆射手中，他是最年轻就考得飞机驾驶证的那一位，也是唯一的一位。

BriefIntroduction.en: Flying shooters that shoot peas at the enemy at a higher speed
BriefIntroduction.zh: 更快地向僵尸发射豌豆，能在空中飞行

Introduction.en: Sun Beans infect zombies with sun. As a zombie takes damage it generates sun.
Introduction.zh: 阳光豆给僵尸施予阳光。当这只僵尸受伤时产生阳光。

Chat.en: As the eldest of the four bean brothers, Sun Bean often finds his siblings exasperating. Chili Bean is a little crude, Laser Bean is too far out, and Spring Bean is just plain lazy. Still, he loves them just the same. That's how it is with family.
Chat.zh: 作为豆子兄弟里的老大哥，阳光豆总觉得他的弟弟妹妹们不靠谱。巴豆总是很粗俗，激光豆太前卫，弹簧豆就是个懒虫。尽管如此，他依然深爱着他的家人们。

BriefIntroduction.en: Zombies that eat it drop suns when damaged
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吃了他的僵尸，会在受伤时掉落阳光

SORT.en: Plantfood Plant Damage: 3000   Plantfood Zombie Damage: 8000
SORT.zh: Plantfood Plant Damage: 3000   Plantfood Zombie Damage: 8000

Introduction.en: Moon Beans turn into a sunbomb when eaten.
Introduction.zh: 月亮豆被吃掉后会变成太阳炸弹。

Chat.en: She and Sunflower are besties. It's just too bad their schedules make it hard for them to get together.
Chat.zh: 她和向日葵是最好的闺蜜，只是可惜她们的生物钟导致她们很难聚在一起。

BriefIntroduction.en: Turn into a sunbomb when eaten
BriefIntroduction.zh: 被吃掉后会变成太阳炸弹

Introduction.en: Pea-nuts can shoot peanuts and block zombies after losing health he gets a faster shot speed.
Introduction.zh: 花生抵挡僵尸，并发射花生子弹。

Chat.en: Pea-nut knows that some folks have an aversion to him. He tries to be sensitive to their concerns and give them the space they need. Still, he can't help but miss the good old days - back when he was the most popular nut around.
Chat.zh: 花生射手知道有些人对他挺“过敏”。他试着了解他们的顾虑，并且给予对方足够的空间。即便如此，他仍然会情不自禁地怀念以前的时光——回到那个人人爱花生的时代。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots peanuts and blocks zombies when on half HP gets a shot speed boost
BriefIntroduction.zh: 阻挡僵尸并发射花生

Introduction.en: Tangle Kelps are aquatic plants that pull the first zombie that nears them underwater.
Introduction.zh: 缠绕水草只能种在水中，僵尸靠近时，将他们拖入水底。

Chat.en: Tangle Kelp likes to go deep. He majored in philosophy. Grab a root beer with him, and he'll go on and on about Nietzsche's "Thus Spoke Zucchini" or hold forth on Kant's "Critique of Petunia Reason." It's cool and all, but sometimes you just want to keep the conversation light. Sometimes you just want to talk about the temperature of the water.
Chat.zh: 缠绕水草喜欢沉思。他主攻哲学。如果拉着他喝上一杯草根啤酒，他就开始不停地讲尼采的“查拉图斯特拉如是说”，要么就是死磕康德的“纯理性批判”，听起来的确很高大上，不过有时你只不过想聊点轻松的话题，比如水底的温度是多少。

BriefIntroduction.en: Aquatic plant that pulls a zombie underwater
BriefIntroduction.zh: 水生植物，将一名僵尸拖入水下

Introduction.en: Bowling Bulbs rolls shots that can bounce into multiple zombies. The Larger bulbs deal more damage.
Introduction.zh: 保龄泡泡滚出可以在僵尸之间来回碰撞的保龄球。保龄球越大，造成的伤害越大。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 越大的保龄球，造成的伤害越大

Chat.en: Guess which team has won the League Championship for five years running now? Team Bowling Bulb, that's who. They are on a ROLL. You and your pals think you got what it takes to stop 'em? Yeah sure. Keep dreamin, bub.
Chat.zh: 猜猜哪个队直到现在蝉联五次冠军？没错，就是保龄泡泡队。他们现在如日中天。你和你的队友以为可以有什么办法打败他们吗？呵呵，继续做梦去吧，伙计。

BriefIntroduction.en: Rolls bouncing shots that can hit multiple zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 滚出弹性的保龄球，对多只僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Guacodiles fire his own children from a distance. When attacked they will rush off the lawn biting any zombies they encounter.
Introduction.zh: 鳄梨向身前的僵尸发射种子子弹。被攻击时它们会冲出并啃咬碰到的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: plant is lost on rushing attack
DESCRIPTION.zh: 冲出时即失去这株植物
冲出时即失去这株植物

Chat.en: Ask Guacodile to tell you a little bit about himself and he'll give you a wry smile. "I'm a Guacodile. I've got a bite like a bear trap. I spit rock-hard pits with a force, speed and accuracy envied by every plant on the battlefield. Heck, I've been known to walk on water. I'm pretty much the whole enchilada." Yeah, the guy is a bit of a braggart but he's good at what he does.
Chat.zh: 问起鳄梨自己的事情，他就会呵呵道：“我曾经被类似熊夹子的陷阱夹过。我总是能吐射出令全场植物妒忌的强力精准，岩石般坚硬的子弹。呵呵，人们说我能在水上漂。我非常喜欢墨西哥辣味卷。”没错，这家伙是有点点飘飘然不过他知道自己在做什么。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots His own children, will rush all zombies ahead of him when attacked
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射子弹，受到攻击时跳起并冲向前方的所有僵尸

Introduction.en: Ghost Peppers haunt zombies that pass by and explode after a short time.
Introduction.zh: 幽灵辣椒惊吓路过的僵尸，并在一段时间后爆炸。

Chat.en: You might not know it looking at her, but Ghost Pepper didn't always wear that white sheet everywhere she went. She first put it on as a lark for a Halloween party one year. Everyone else had these elaborate costumes, and she thought that it would be funny to dress like a plain ol' ghost. But she fell in love with that costume. It spoke to her. She'd found her calling.
Chat.zh: 光是看她你可能不知道，实际上幽灵辣椒并不是一直在哪都穿着她的那块白布。她有年万圣节穿着这件去参加万圣节晚会，当时其他人都是打扮得花里胡哨，只有她觉得打扮成一只平凡古板的小幽灵会很好玩。但这之后她彻底喜欢上了这种穿搭。对她来说，就像是找到了她的归宿一般。

BriefIntroduction.en: Haunts all zombies that pass by and explodes after a short time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 惊吓路过的僵尸，并在一段时间后爆炸

Introduction.en: Sweet Potatoes attract zombies from other lanes when they are close by.
Introduction.zh: 甜薯会将相邻行接近的僵尸吸引到本行。

Chat.en: Sweet Potato really is as sweet as she looks. Her favorite animal is the unicorn. Her favorite color is (and this is a direct quote) "all the colors in the rainbow". When she writes the letter "i", she draws a little heart where the dot belongs. Frankly, if it were anyone else, this amount of syrup would be sickening. But on her, well, it just seems right.
Chat.zh: 甜薯真的和她看上去那样甜蜜。她最喜欢的动物是独角兽，最喜欢的颜色是（据她所说）“彩虹的颜色”。当她写字母“i”时，她会不自禁在那颗圆点的位置上画颗爱心。说实话，换作是别人像她那样在食物中加糖浆调味，估计会被呛坏，但是对她来说刚刚好。

BriefIntroduction.en: Attracts zombies from other lanes when they are close
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吸引相邻行靠近的僵尸

Introduction.en: Meteor-pults lob flaming Hot meteor with a slow rate at zombies and keep nearby plants warm.
Introduction.zh: 甜椒投手向僵尸投出火焰辣椒还能冰释其周围的植物。

Chat.en: Some say meteor-pult is a hot head. Some find his fiery disposition off-putting. But the truth is, he's just very focused and determined. He loves what he does. He appreciates everything he has. "I came from the weedy side of the lawn," meteor-pult explains. "I worked hard to pull myself up by my roots. I'm a self-made pepper and I don't take a single thing for granted."
Chat.zh: 有人说，甜椒投手有点容易头脑发热。有些人觉得他火热的性格让人倒胃口。但事实是，他只是比较专注和执着而已。他爱他所做的事情。他感谢自己拥有的一切。 “我来自草坪的野草区，”辣椒投手解释。 “我努力扎根令自己立足。我是一个自力更生的辣椒，我认为任何事都不是理所当然的。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs flaming meteors at zombies and warms nearby plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷燃烧的甜椒子弹，冰释身边的植物

Introduction.en: Hot Potatoes melt the ice blocks they're planted on.
Introduction.zh: 烤马铃薯会将本格的冰块融化。

Chat.en: How does Hot Potato stay so positive and even-peeled all the time? Yoga, that's how. She never misses a class. Also, regular meditation. It's the only way she can handle the hard work of fighting zombies, day in and day out, without melting down.
Chat.zh: 烤马铃薯即使在去皮时也能活得如此积极，为什么？瑜伽，这就是答案。她从来没有错过哪怕一堂瑜伽课。此外，还有定期冥想。这是她能够面对僵尸战斗，日复一日辛勤工作而没有倒下去的唯一方法。

BriefIntroduction.en: Plant it on an ice block to melt the block
BriefIntroduction.zh: 种植在冰块上并融化这块冰块

Introduction.en: Stunions breathe a stunning cloud of gas on nearby zombies in the lane.
Introduction.zh: 眩晕洋葱向本行靠近的僵尸吐出眩晕的气体。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, activates when zombie is close
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，僵尸靠近时触发

Chat.en: Oh sure, everyone knows Stunion as the battle-hardened warrior with the potent breath. But he's so much more than that. He's an accomplished pianist. He speaks five languages fluently. Heck, he's the leader of a Cub Shallots group in his spare time. Dude's got layers. Go on, peel 'em back. You'll see.
Chat.zh: 哦，当然，每个人都知道眩晕洋葱作为战士以他强大的气团在战场上驰骋多年。但他可远不止这点本事。他是一个多才多艺的钢琴家。他会说五种流利的语言。哎呀，他在业余时间还是青葱年少组织的组长。这位老兄层次很多哦。来吧，一层层剥开，你就会看到。

BriefIntroduction.en: Stuns nearby zombies in the lane
BriefIntroduction.zh: 使本行靠近的僵尸眩晕

Introduction.en: Gold Leaves create a Gold Tile on planting.
Introduction.zh: 黄金叶在种植时放置一枚黄金地砖。

Chat.en: "For a small initial investment, you too can generate huge sun," says Gold Leaf. She's a firm believer in solar markets.
Chat.zh: “即使开始投入一点点,你也能收获巨大阳光”, 黄金叶说。她是太阳能市场的死忠粉丝。

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates Gold Tile on planting
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在种植时放置一枚黄金地砖

Introduction.en: A.K.E.E.s lob projectiles that bounce from zombie to zombie.
Introduction.zh: AKEE 喷射出能在僵尸之间弹跳的投掷物

Chat.en: Autonomous Katapulting Ejectomatic Emitter is actively looking for a different acronym for A.K.E.E., because let's face it, "Katapulting" is just not working.
Chat.zh: AKEE，全名为全自动（autonomous）弹射（katapulting）喷射（ejectomatic）发射器（emitter），正在寻找一组新的高级词汇首字母凑成自己的名字。因为他也很清楚自己和“弹射”毫不沾边。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs projectiles that bounce from zombie to zombie and knocksnback them
BriefIntroduction.zh: 喷射出能在僵尸之间弹跳的投掷物

Introduction.en: Endurians are defensive plants that deal damage to zombies attacking them.
Introduction.zh: 榴莲既可以防御，也能对靠近的僵尸造成伤害。

Chat.en: "When other plants talk about me, they say I'm too gruff. They say I'm difficult to approach, that I'm afraid to let others get too close to me. Also, I smell terrible," said Endurian. But deep down inside, he knows that he's so much more than that. He's also short-tempered.
Chat.zh: “当其他植物提及我时，他们说我很暴躁。他们说我难以靠近，这使我很不情愿让别人离我太近。而且我的味道也很难闻。”榴莲说道。但在他内心深处，他很清楚自己不只是如此，他其实还是个很暴躁的家伙。

BriefIntroduction.en: Blocks off zombies and protects your other plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 防御的同时对靠近的僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Toadstools gulp down zombies whole, then produce sun.
Introduction.zh: 金蟾菇将僵尸整只吞下，并产出阳光。

Chat.en: Toadstool just can't stand being idle. "I keep everything that I want to do on lists, and keep the lists where I can see them so that I'm always motivated!" she said. Whenever there's work to be done, she's always the first to hop to it.
Chat.zh: 金蟾菇不喜欢傻站着。“我把所有我想做的事都记在小本子上，并总把小本子放在我能看到的地方，这样我就能时刻保持动力！”她说。每当有工作需要完成，她总能第一个跳出来。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gulps down zombies whole, then produce sun
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将僵尸整只吞下，并产出阳光

Introduction.en: Lava Guavas erupt, creating a lava pool that burns zombies.
Introduction.zh: 岩浆番石榴喷发时在原地留下一滩岩浆，可以灼烧僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 喷发时，对四周的僵尸造成伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: creates a burning lava pool in its tile

Chat.en: Lava Guava frowns with barely-repressed rage. He's trying to keep it in check. He's trying so hard. But one day some zombie's going to push him too far and he can't be held responsible for the consequences.
Chat.zh: 岩浆番石榴总是皱着眉头压抑着愤怒。他一直尽可能地保持冷静，他为此付出不少努力，但当僵尸对他得寸进尺时，这只僵尸就只能为他的行为付出代价了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Erupts and leaves behind a burning lava pool
BriefIntroduction.zh: 喷发并留下一滩滚烫的岩浆

Introduction.en: Phat Beets thump out damage every 6 seconds.
Introduction.zh: 魔音甜菜每秒震出音波攻击僵尸。

Chat.en: Phat Beet has been known to drop sick rhymes, dope grooves, and highly satisfactory jams, often within seconds of each other.
Chat.zh: 魔音甜菜拥有劲爆的节奏和韵律，还有令人沉迷的曲子，不过只有短短几秒。

BriefIntroduction.en: Thumps out damage every 6 seconds
BriefIntroduction.zh: 每隔一段时间发动音波攻击

Introduction.en: Strawburst grows a berry for small, medium or huge damage!
Introduction.zh: 爆浆草莓随着成长，提供伤害不同的爆浆莓果！

Chat.en: "Big is good," says Strawburst. "Though small's pretty choice as well. And you should never discount medium. I just like sizes, really."
Chat.zh: “越大的东西越好，”爆浆草莓说道。“尽管小一点也很精致，中等大小的也不赖，我只是喜欢琳琅满目、大大小小的东西，说实话。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Grows a berry for small, medium or huge damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 随着成长，提供伤害不同的爆浆莓果

Introduction.en: Thyme Warps rewind time, sending zombies back where they started.
Introduction.zh: 逆时草能让时间回溯，使僵尸回退到初始状态。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 被回溯的僵尸血量会回满

Chat.en: "Possibilities other to open be to need we." Warp Thyme says, "Limited too far was time to approach unidirectional the that felt always I've."
Chat.zh: “性能可的它其受接要需们我”逆时草说，“限局常非性向单的间时得觉直一我。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Sends zombies back where they started
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将僵尸回退到他们出现的位置

Introduction.en: Seal-shrooms are short-range shooters that last for a short time, less in water.
Introduction.zh: 海蘑菇射程短，一段时间后消失，但能在海水中存活更久。

Chat.en: Seal-shroom's is very scared of water thats why it fucking dies when it touch water.
Chat.zh: 海蘑菇第一次见到大海时的那种感觉已经刻进了他的菌丝。

BriefIntroduction.en: Short-range shooter, lasts for a short time but lives less in water
BriefIntroduction.zh: 射程短，并且一段时间后消失，在水中能存活更久

Introduction.en: Garlics divert zombies into other lanes.
Introduction.zh: 大蒜把僵尸分散到其他行。

Chat.en: Good against zombies, as well as proof against any vampires who might accidentally wander by.
Chat.zh: 对付僵尸的好法宝，同时也饶不了周围闲逛的吸血鬼。

BriefIntroduction.en: Diverts zombies into other lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 把僵尸分散到其他行

Introduction.en: Electric Blueberries randomly attacks zombies every so often.
Introduction.zh: 闪电蓝莓每隔一段时间发射一团雷云，烧毁随机的僵尸。

Chat.en: Electric Blueberry prides herself for being eclectic as well as electric. "I like to keep'em guessing," she says. "A zombie should always be like, 'Whoa, didn't see that coming,' when they're disintegrated."
Chat.zh: 闪电蓝莓因她的不拘一格和易怒如雷的性格而自豪。“我想让他们一直好奇着，”她说。“僵尸在被解体时总会感到吃惊：‘喔！别人都说她很弱的啊！’”

BriefIntroduction.en: Randomly attacks zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 烧毁随机的僵尸

Introduction.en: Spore-shrooms fire spores that poisons and make zombies create new Spore-shrooms when defeated.
Introduction.zh: 孢子菇向僵尸发射能使僵尸被击败时产生孢子菇的子弹。

Chat.en: "My favorite arithmetic operation?" wonders Spore-shroom. "I guess I'd have to say, um, addition. Hang on, no... multiplication."
Chat.zh: “我最喜欢的算术方式？”孢子菇想。“我猜应该是，嗯，加法！等等，不……是乘法。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Spawns new Spore-shrooms from defeated zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 使僵尸被击败时能产生新的孢子菇

Introduction.en: Intensive Carrots bring eaten plants back to life with 3 times health.
Introduction.zh: 复活萝卜将被打败的植物复活。

Chat.en: "How do I revive defeated plants?" asks Intensive Carrot. "In a word: Vitamins. Vitamins and sorcery."
Chat.zh: “猜猜我怎么让植物死而复生？”复活萝卜问道。“简言之，就是用维生素，维生素加上魔法。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Brings eaten plants back to life with some more health
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将被打败的植物复活

DESCRIPTION.en: Freezes and chills zombies for a short time.
can be crushed by gargs and cars
DESCRIPTION.zh: 会被滚动前行的僵尸摧毁

DESCRIPTION.en: summons an icy sawblade that damages and pushes back all zombies in its lane

Introduction.en: iceweed stalls zombies with his icyspikes.
Introduction.zh: 生产比向日葵更多的阳光

BriefIntroduction.en: Iceweeds spikes freezes and chills zombies.
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生产比向日葵更多的阳光

Chat.en: Iceweeds bigges fear is the climate change.
Chat.zh: 双胞向日葵那副超级时尚又无比昂贵的墨镜让她不论在哪都像个大明星。因此她不论去到哪里都会被“枸籽队”簇拥。

Introduction.en: Atomic Bombegranates explode on contact, dealing heavy damages in a huge area and spawning Seedlings around them.
Introduction.zh: 原子石榴弹在被僵尸接触时自爆，生成小种子。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，接触到僵尸时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: Seedlings around will grow up into new bombegranates
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在周围产生的小种子长大后会变成新的原子石榴弹

Chat.en: Remember: Never ever EVER split a fruit. Oh, hold on, actually fruits are ok, just never split an atom or it make boom.
Chat.zh: 记住，永远不要，千万不要切开一个水果。哦，不对，切开水果没关系，不要切开原子就行。

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes on contact, spawning Seedlings around
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在僵尸触碰时爆炸，并在周围生成小种子

Introduction.en: Shine Vines are vine plants that amplify the sun production of sun producer plants, except Moonflower, create some sun on their own, and use a sun-stun burst as a last second defense when attacked.
Introduction.zh: 闪耀藤蔓能促进其依附的阳光植物的生产，使它们在生产时产出更多的阳光，月光花除外。在受到威胁的时候用阳光闪晕身边的僵尸作为防御。

Chat.en: "Peek-a-boo!" giggles Shine Vine, staring directly at you, the player. "Consider that fourth wall SHATTERED!"
Chat.zh: “躲猫猫！” 闪耀藤蔓咯咯笑着，直勾勾地盯着屏幕前的你。“就当这第四面墙已经碎了吧！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Boost sunproducer and stuns zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 促进阳光的生产

Introduction.en: Pyro Vines can be planted on top of other plants to provide protection from cold plus an additional close range flame attack.
Introduction.zh: 柴火藤蔓可以被种植在其他植物上，使本格的植物免受寒冻，对短距离内的敌人造成灼烧伤害。

Chat.en: pyrovine bakes potato with just touching them.
Chat.zh: 柴火藤蔓审视着他的地产、财富和庞大的宝库。他觉得这些理应让自己满足，然而他依然感到焦虑和恐惧。

BriefIntroduction.en: Warms and flames
BriefIntroduction.zh: 温暖四周并喷火

Introduction.en: Honey-Pults lob projectiles that explodes above zombies and letting a sticky honey tile on the ground.
Introduction.zh: 生产比向日葵更多的阳光

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs melons that are filled with honey.
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生产比向日葵更多的阳光

Chat.en: Honeypult had once a date and his date said he is sweet as honey after that he was bright red
Chat.zh: 双胞向日葵那副超级时尚又无比昂贵的墨镜让她不论在哪都像个大明星。因此她不论去到哪里都会被“枸籽队”簇拥。
